figures.name: Kintu
figures.title: Legendary Founder of the Ganda
figures.quote: Kintu came from the east, from the direction of Mount Elgon.
figures.summary: A foundational figure in the oral traditions of the Baganda people of Uganda, whose story preserves the memory of an eastern highland origin for the Bantu migrations.

figures.name: Tubal-cain
figures.title: The First Smith
figures.quote: He was the forger of all instruments of bronze and iron. — Genesis 4:22
figures.summary: A descendant of Cain who mastered metallurgy before the Flood. His ancient knowledge was likely preserved through Noah's family and later recovered by early African societies.
